Submit Invoice for Factoring

Enter freight invoice details. Advance and fee are calculated server-side with integer arithmetic.

Invoice Details
Stored as integer cents — no float math on money paths
Stored in basis points (9000 bps)
Stored in basis points (200 bps)
Advance Preview
Computed in integer cents — identical to server logic
Face Value$0.00
Advance (90%)$0.00
Fee (2%)$0.00
Reserve Holdback$0.00
Carrier receives advance immediately upon disburse. Reserve minus fee released on collection.
Integer Math
advance = floor(face × rateBps / 10000)
